summary: Run autonomous browser QA against critical user journeys and return reproducible failure evidence.

inputs.name: credential_strategy
inputs.description: How login credentials are provided to browser automation.

inputs.name: journey_list
inputs.description: Ordered list of high-value user flows to execute.

outputs.name: journey_results
outputs.description: Pass/fail and error detail for each journey.

outputs.name: reproduction_steps
outputs.description: Deterministic repro steps for each failing journey.

outputs.name: failure_screenshots
outputs.description: Screenshot references for failed browser states.

workflow_steps: Define journey scope around business-critical paths.
Run browser automation against each journey with stable test data.
Capture pass/fail outcomes and evidence for failures.
Return prioritized failure list with reproduction guidance.

verification.smoke_test: Run against a staging URL with at least three journeys and verify each result includes pass/fail plus repro details.
